text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the Tokyo Daishoten—the final
hurrah to round off this year's dirt races! We've
got more spectators this time around ready to see
a fierce showdown!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...This race is Inari's last goal of the year.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let's see her through it, as fellow racers from the
same generation.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect Oguri Cap and Super Creek to
come and see the Tokyo Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
And they're here for Inari One? Is she that much
of an important runner to them?

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Inari One saw Oguri Cap and Tamamo
Cross battle it out at the Arima Kinen. I wonder if
that'll affect what she brings to the table today...
We'll have to keep an eye on her.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, enough to ask ya how best to get rid of
these shivers.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But I plan on wrappin' up this finale with a bang.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So keep your eyes peeled for the moment I take
the top of the regionals!
choice_data_list: I wouldn't miss it for anything!
I wouldn't miss it for anything!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey. Some time's past since the Japan Dirt Derby,
hasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Oi Racer
text_block_list.text:
...I expected this much from ya. Ya look poised to
cut me down any second. That's the Inari One I
know.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...You're pretty amazing yourself. You're
completely different from when I last saw ya.

text_block_list.name: Oi Racer
text_block_list.text:
I'm not the only one. Everyone here's staked their
lives on a chance to get to the top.

text_block_list.name: Oi Racer
text_block_list.text: Let's see who's got more Oi spirit flowing in 'em!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's on! You're gonna have front row seats to
seein' my climb to the top!
